chunks.title: Introduction and Praise
chunks.reason: Title block and opening declaration of love for God.

chunks.title: Deliverance from Distress
chunks.reason: Narrative of distress, divine intervention, and rescue.

chunks.title: Righteousness and Reward
chunks.reason: Explanation of God's reward based on David's faithfulness.

chunks.title: Victory in Battle
chunks.reason: Description of divine strength leading to military victory and dominion.

chunks.title: Final Praise and Promise
chunks.reason: Concluding doxology and promise of eternal salvation to the king.
